description: Ollama Cloud is Ollama's hosted inference API.

novel_features.name: Model advisor
novel_features.description: Picks the right Ollama Cloud model for a prompt by combining live catalog, heuristic prompt-feature extraction, curated cost/latency metadata, and an optional cheap meta-LLM tiebreak.

novel_features.name: Side-by-side comparison
novel_features.description: Runs the same prompt against N hosted models in parallel and emits side-by-side response, tokens, and latency.

novel_features.name: Advisor explain
novel_features.description: With --explain, advise emits the full scoring trace: feature extraction, per-model scores, filter passes, tiebreak rationale.

novel_features.name: Advisor replay
novel_features.description: Replays advisor recommendations and reports divergence between recommended models and actually-chosen models. Foundation for the divergence canary; the prompt corpus is not retained so judge-LLM scoring is not in scope until a corpus sidecar ships.

novel_features.name: Budget probe
novel_features.description: Probes the free-tier weekly cap with a 1-token chat. Parses Ollama Cloud's 429 prose and emits a structured verdict (ok | exhausted | unknown) with the upgrade URL so agents can pre-flight quota before launching long sessions.

novel_features.name: Cost trace
novel_features.description: Aggregates advisor-log cost estimates over a time window; compares per-model and per-task-hint spend.
